title: Opening for Medical Officer at Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group

jsonLd.title: Opening for Medical Officer at Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group in Jabalpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group:
Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
